name: QRadar - Web Admin Panel Brute Force
description: Detects multiple failed login attempts to admin interfaces
aql_query: SELECT sourceip, COUNT(*) FROM events WHERE (url LIKE '%/admin/login%' OR url LIKE '%/wp-login.php%') AND (payload LIKE '%failed%' OR payload LIKE '%unauthorized%') GROUP BY sourceip HAVING COUNT(*) > 20 TIMESPAN 3m
